ACT4_GRAND_LIBRARY_EVENT.title: The Architect's Grand Library
ACT4_GRAND_LIBRARY_EVENT.pages.INITIAL.d: A vast library stretches before you, its shelves lined with tomes bound by the Architect's will. Four ancient books pulse with restrained power. You cannot carry them all. Which will you steal?
ACT4_EMPYREAL_CACHE.options.STAGE_1_A.de: Duplicate a card, claim Looming Fruit, and bottle a fairy.
ACT4_EMPYREAL_CACHE.options.STAGE_1_B.de: Take a trio of power relics.
ACT4_EMPYREAL_CACHE.options.STAGE_2_B.de: Claim Pael's flesh and two heavy relics.
ACT4_EMPYREAL_CACHE.options.STAGE_3_A.de: Take a fortune in gold and relics.
ACT4_EMPYREAL_CACHE.pages.FINISH.descrip: The stranger studies you for a moment, then nods and produces a few final treasures from a hidden cache. Not everything, but enough to tilt the odds. With a last measured glance, the trader melts back into the dark and leaves the climb toward the Architect open.
ACT4_EMPYREAL_CACHE.pages.INITIAL.descri: Going after the Architect, are you? Hmm. You look far from ready. Still, I would like to see his tyranny ended. Here. I can spare a few things, though I cannot pin all my hopes on you. Choose with care.
ACT4_EMPYREAL_CACHE.pages.STAGE_2.descri: The merchant studies you again, then opens a second case. If you mean to climb higher, you will need more than courage.
ACT4_EMPYREAL_CACHE.pages.STAGE_3.descri: One final cache clicks open. The stranger keeps one hand on the latch, waiting to see what you value most.
ACT4_EMPYREAL_CACHE.pages.STAGE_4.descri: A hidden drawer slides free at the very end. The trader's expression never changes, but the remaining wares are plainly meant for a final wager.
ACT4_EMPYREAL_CACHE.title: Empyreal Cache
ACT4_ROYAL_TREASURY.options.STAGE_1_A.de: Take royal relics and a rare fruit.
ACT4_ROYAL_TREASURY.options.STAGE_1_B.de: Take forge relics, Nutritious Oyster, and extra random relics.
ACT4_ROYAL_TREASURY.options.STAGE_2_A.de: Take a rush of gold, relics, and bottled revival.
ACT4_ROYAL_TREASURY.options.STAGE_2_B.de: Duplicate a card, then claim Mango, Gorget, and Golden Pearl.
ACT4_ROYAL_TREASURY.pages.FINISH.descrip: The cache closes with a satisfied click. A Prismatic Gem, The Courier, and a Blood Potion join the last gift you chose, and the weight of that hidden aid follows you toward the summit.
ACT4_ROYAL_TREASURY.pages.INITIAL.descri: You find the same clandestine trader waiting farther up the path, perched beside another impossible hoard. Ah. Still alive. Good. Then take a little more, and see whether fate intends you to reach him after all.
ACT4_ROYAL_TREASURY.pages.STAGE_2.descri: With a quiet nod, the trader lifts another velvet lining. The next offerings gleam in the dim light.
ACT4_ROYAL_TREASURY.pages.STAGE_3.descri: The final compartment opens. The trader says nothing now, leaving the last choice entirely in your hands.
ACT4_ROYAL_TREASURY.pages.STAGE_4.descri: The hoard is not yet exhausted. One last layer unfolds, as if the trader had been saving a final test for those who actually survived this far.
ACT4_ROYAL_TREASURY.title: Royal Treasury
